title: Record sums for defense and zero for Ukraine: the White House...
title_en: Record sums for defense and zero for Ukraine: the White House...
title_uk: Рекордні суми на оборону і нульові для України: Білий дім...
description: Record sums for defense and zero for Ukraine: the White House presented the US budget for 2027 Judging by the published document, there is no provision for Ukraine in it at all - neither military, financial, nor humanitarian. At the same time, $18 billion has been earmarked for aid to other countries. The total amount of expenditures is $2.16 trillion, of which $1.5 trillion will be allocated to defense — this is 40% more than in 2026...
description_en: Record sums for defense and zero for Ukraine: the White House presented the US budget for 2027 Judging by the published document, there is no provision for Ukraine in it at all - neither military, financial, nor humanitarian. At the same time, $18 billion has been earmarked for aid to other countries. The total amount of expenditures is $2.16 trillion, of which $1.5 trillion will be allocated to defense — this is 40% more than in 2026...
description_uk: Рекордные сумы на оборону и ноль для Украины: Белый дом представил бюджет США на 2027 год Судя по опубликованному документу, помощь Украине в нем вообще не предусмотрена — ни военная, ни финансовая, ни гуманитарная. При этом, на помощь другим странам заложено $18 млрд. Общий объем расходов составляет $2,16 трлн, из которых $1,5 трлн направят на оборону — это на 40% больше, чем в 2026 году....

title: Kursk: Drone incoming
title_en: Kursk: Drone incoming
title_uk: Курськ: Дрон входить
description: 260 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 4 (from 18:00 on April 3), the enemy attacked 286 attack UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and other types of UAVs from the directions: Shatalovo, Bryansk, Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, about 200 of them - "shahedis". The air attack was repelled by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile...
description_en: 260 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 4 (from 18:00 on April 3), the enemy attacked 286 attack UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and other types of UAVs from the directions: Shatalovo, Bryansk, Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, about 200 of them - "shahedis". The air attack was repelled by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 260 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА У ніч на 04 квітня (з 18:00 03 квітня) противник атакував 286 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed, Гербера, Італмас та безпілотниками інших типів із напрямків: Шаталово, Брянськ, Курськ, Орел, Міллєрово, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., близько 200 із них – "шахеди". Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська, підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних систем, мобільні...

title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
title_uk: Безпілотний удар
description: Last night, drones "walked" over the chemical plants in Tolyatti of the Samara region of the Goryat enterprises "Tolyattikauchuk" and "KuibyshevAzot". Locals write that there has never been such a massive attack. Taganrog was also hit. The local authorities recognized the damage to the warehouses, as well as the vessel, which was located not far from the port.
description_en: Last night, drones "walked" over the chemical plants in Tolyatti of the Samara region of the Goryat enterprises "Tolyattikauchuk" and "KuibyshevAzot". Locals write that there has never been such a massive attack. Taganrog was also hit. The local authorities recognized the damage to the warehouses, as well as the vessel, which was located not far from the port.
description_uk: Дроны этой ночью «прошлись» по химическим заводам в Тольятти Самарской области Горят предприятия «Тольяттикаучук» и «КуйбышевАзот». Местные пишут, что такой массированной атаки еще не было. Также под удар попал Таганрог. Местные власти признали повреждение складов, а также судна, находившегося неподалеку от порта.

title: Kyiv: While Ukraine aid runs dry, Trump asks for record-breaking $1.5...
title_en: Kyiv: While Ukraine aid runs dry, Trump asks for record-breaking $1.5...
title_uk: Київ: Поки допомога Україні закінчується, Трамп просить рекордні 1,5 долара...
description: While Ukraine aid runs dry, Trump asks for record-breaking $1.5 trillion in military spending. The proposed budget calls for a $445 billion (44%) increase in defense funds in 2027 — as U.S. military aid to Ukraine has dropped by 99% under Trump's watch.
description_en: While Ukraine aid runs dry, Trump asks for record-breaking $1.5 trillion in military spending. The proposed budget calls for a $445 billion (44%) increase in defense funds in 2027 — as U.S. military aid to Ukraine has dropped by 99% under Trump's watch.
description_uk: While Ukraine aid runs dry, Trump asks for record-breaking $1.5 trillion in military spending. The proposed budget calls for a $445 billion (44%) increase in defense funds in 2027 — as U.S. military aid to Ukraine has dropped by 99% under Trump's watch.

title_uk: Київ: Повідомлено про відключення електроенергії
description: Russia's banks face major service outages amid internet crackdown. Long lines formed at shops, restaurants, and gas stations in multiple Russian cities on April 3, as establishments could only accept cash payments. The outage may be connected to the Kremlin's restriction of VPNs.
description_en: Russia's banks face major service outages amid internet crackdown. Long lines formed at shops, restaurants, and gas stations in multiple Russian cities on April 3, as establishments could only accept cash payments. The outage may be connected to the Kremlin's restriction of VPNs.

title_uk: Крим: в окупованому Криму під час навчань розбився російський винищувач Су-30...
description: Russian Su-30 fighter jet crashes in occupied Crimea during training flight, Kremlin Defense Ministry claims. The crew ejected and was recovered by a search-and-rescue team, the ministry claimed.
description_en: Russian Su-30 fighter jet crashes in occupied Crimea during training flight, Kremlin Defense Ministry claims. The crew ejected and was recovered by a search-and-rescue team, the ministry claimed.
description_uk: Russian Su-30 fighter jet crashes in occupied Crimea during training flight, Kremlin Defense Ministry claims. The crew ejected and was recovered by a search-and-rescue team, the ministry claimed.

title: Energy infrastructure hit
title_en: Energy infrastructure hit
title_uk: Поразка енергетичної інфраструктури
description: Today I held a selector at the level of the government and all our regions - on the situation in the energy sector. We are already preparing for next winter and are gradually restoring what the Russian strikes destroyed this winter. Across the country, sustainability plans have been approved for each region. Repair of roads after winter continues. It is important not to waste time at the level of communities, at the level of regional authorities. Every object that matters...
description_en: Today I held a selector at the level of the government and all our regions - on the situation in the energy sector. We are already preparing for next winter and are gradually restoring what the Russian strikes destroyed this winter. Across the country, sustainability plans have been approved for each region. Repair of roads after winter continues. It is important not to waste time at the level of communities, at the level of regional authorities. Every object that matters...
description_uk: Провів сьогодні селектор на рівні уряду та всіх наших областей – по ситуації в енергетиці. Уже готуємось до наступної зими та поступово відновлюємо те, що російські удари зруйнували цією зимою. По всій країні затверджені плани стійкості для кожного регіону. Триває і ремонт доріг після зими. Важливо на рівні громад, на рівні влади в областях не втрачати часу. Кожен обʼєкт, який має значення,...
